evals.prompt: Generate background music for the castle-defense game. I want something epic and orchestral for when the player is defending the castle.
evals.expected_output: A bash command using mmx music generate with --instrumental flag, appropriate orchestral genre, epic mood, and saved to apps/advantage-games/public/sounds/castle-defense-battle.mp3
expectations: The command uses mmx music generate
The prompt mentions castle, defense, or medieval theme

evals.prompt: Create a main theme song with lyrics for Reading Advantage. Make it an inspiring anime-style opening theme about learning and adventure.
evals.expected_output: A bash command with mmx music generate including --lyrics with substantial multi-verse content (not just a few lines), saved to the sounds directory
expectations: The command uses mmx music generate
The command includes --lyrics with substantial content (multiple verses, chorus, bridge)
The lyrics mention Reading Advantage, learning, or adventure
The lyrics include at least 3 sections (Verse, Chorus, Bridge)

evals.prompt: Generate music for the haunted-library game. It should be spooky but not too scary since it's for kids.
evals.expected_output: An mmx command with ambient/mysterious mood, appropriate for children, saved to sounds directory
expectations: The command uses mmx music generate
The mood is mysterious, magical, or whimsical (not terrifying)
